testcase.name: test_2_create_order_with_pending_items

failure.message: AssertionError: Get pending items failed: Internal Server Error assert 520 == 200 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_add_order_enhancements.py:127: in test_2_create_order_with_pending_items assert pending_response.status_code == 200, f"Get pending items failed: {pending_response.text}" E AssertionError: Get pending items failed: Internal Server Error E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_3_create_order_with_multiple_pending_items
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_add_order_enhancements.py:194: in test_3_create_order_with_multiple_pending_items assert pending_response.status_code == 200 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
